# MVP Progress

This is a human-readable progress board for the current MVP.

Runtime progress is also stored in:

```text
.agent-dev-kit/progress/progress-board.json
```

## Current MVP

- MVP ID:
- Goal:
- Selected Solution:
- Status:

## Features

| Feature ID | Title | Status | Current Step | Next Step | Linked Spec | Linked Test | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| F-001 | Example small feature | todo | Define failing test | Implement minimal behavior | spec/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md | TBD | TBD |

## Status Rules

```text
todo     not started
doing    currently being implemented
blocked  waiting for decision/log/tool/user input
review   implementation done, waiting for review/gate
done     verified and accepted
dropped  intentionally removed
```
